response.objective_caption: Two women stand close together in the foreground of an indoor setting, one wearing a dark V-neck top and the other wearing a thin-strapped dark top, while a third person in a sleeveless green patterned dress stands behind them near a light-colored wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two women stand close together in the foreground of an indoor setting, one in a dark V-neck top and the other in a thin-strapped dark top, while a third person in a sleeveless green patterned dress appears motion-blurred in the background near a light-colored wall. Harsh direct flash illuminates the foreground subjects, creating bright specular highlights on their skin and deep shadows that fall off into near-total darkness behind them.
